data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for milestone definition and acceptance workflow.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the milestone definition and acceptance workflow, but the evidence provided does not include specific details or checks related to this requirement. While there are multiple successful prior steps, none of them explicitly confirm the existence or functionality of the milestone workflow, leading to an inconclusive result. Therefore, the validation cannot be completed as the necessary evidence is lacking.
gaps: No evidence of milestone definition and acceptance workflow.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
